title: Sheet Pan Sausage & Peppers
description: A quick and easy sheet pan meal featuring savory sausage and colorful bell peppers, perfect for a busy weeknight dinner that the whole family will love.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a large baking sheet with parchment paper for easy cleanup.
Slice bell peppers and onion into 1/2-inch strips.
In a large bowl, combine sliced peppers, onion, and sausage. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with garlic powder, oregano, salt, and pepper. Toss to coat evenly.
Spread the mixture in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet.
Roast for 20-25 minutes, or until vegetables are tender and sausage is cooked through, stirring halfway.
tips: For extra flavor, try adding a pinch of red pepper flakes if your family enjoys a little heat.
Serve with rice, pasta, or crusty bread to soak up the delicious juices.
Leftovers can be stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
